backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining the e-commerce backend with product management, site settings, and user profile operations, using role-based access control to restrict admin and user actions.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that maps the old actor's `siteSettingsPersistent` field to the new actor's `siteSettings` field during canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the authenticated-actor guard for `updateSiteSettings` (with early rejection and 'Please log in' toast) is implemented in `SiteSettingsSection.tsx` and `useQueries.ts`.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summary catalog describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes using Tailwind's base layer, with CSS custom properties for colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Glow Shop — Luxury Cosmetics' with Google Fonts preconnect links and a root div for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes and applies the dynamic color scheme from site settings to the document root element.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart line item component displaying product image, name, price, quantity selector, line total, and a remove button with optimistic local quantity state and error toast handling.
frontend/src/components/DeleteProductDia: Confirmation alert dialog for deleting a product, calling the `useDeleteProduct` mutation and showing success or error toasts on completion.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProducts: Displays a grid of up to 8 featured products fetched via a query hook, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states, plus a link to the full shop.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, brand promise list, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/HeroBanner.tsx: Full-width hero section with a background image (custom or fallback), gradient overlay, headline copy, and a 'Shop Now' CTA button linking to /shop.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a sticky Navigation header, a main content Outlet, and a Footer.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop and mobile nav links (Home, Shop, Admin), and a cart icon showing live item count.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component for a single product showing image, category, name, price, sold-out state, and an add-to-cart button with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProductFilters.t: Sidebar filter panel with category pill buttons and a price-range slider, plus a 'Clear all' option when filters are active.
frontend/src/components/ProductFormDialo: Modal dialog for adding or editing a product, containing a validated form with fields for name, category, description, price, image URL, stock, and featured flag.
frontend/src/components/ProductTable.tsx: Renders a table of products with image, category, price, stock, and featured status columns, and provides edit/delete actions via dialog modals. Shows an empty state when no products exist.
frontend/src/components/PromoBanner.tsx: Displays a horizontally scrolling marquee promo banner with a rose overlay, supporting custom text or default promotional items, and can be disabled via props.
frontend/src/components/QuantitySelector: A controlled quantity input component with increment/decrement buttons and a numeric input field, enforcing configurable min/max bounds.
frontend/src/components/ShopifyImportPan: Displays a grid of Shopify products fetched via the Storefront API and allows importing individual products into the local catalog, with skeleton loading states and error handling.
frontend/src/components/SiteSettingsSect: Admin form for editing site settings including store info, hero banner URL, color scheme, Shopify integration credentials, and promo banner configuration, with save/error feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flows, delegation validity, and exposing identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including product CRUD, cart management, order placement, and site settings, using the ICP actor and Internet Identity for authenticated mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for multiple color schemes (default, dark, rose-petal, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with authentication guard that provides tabbed management of products, site settings, and Shopify import, requiring Internet Identity login to access.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantities and a subtotal summary, handling loading skeletons and an empty-cart state with a link back to the shop.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page that summarizes cart items, calculates shipping and total, and handles order placement by calling the backend then redirecting to an order confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page displaying a hero banner, promo banner, featured products, a features section, and a CTA section linking to the shop.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Order confirmation page that reads the last order ID from sessionStorage and displays a success message with order reference and next-steps info.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page that fetches a single product by ID, shows its image, price, stock status, and allows the user to select a quantity and add it to the cart.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Shop listing page that fetches all products and provides category and price-range filtering with a responsive sidebar, displaying results in a product grid.
frontend/src/types.ts: Defines local TypeScript interfaces (Product, CartItem, ShoppingCart, Order, SiteSettings) that mirror the backend data structures for the cosmetics store.
frontend/src/utils/imageHelpers.ts: Provides helper functions that return static asset paths for the hero banner, promo banner, product placeholder, and resolves a product image URL with a fallback to the placeholder.
frontend/src/utils/session.ts: Manages a persistent session ID stored in localStorage, generating a new UUID if one does not already exist.
frontend/src/utils/shopifyApi.ts: Fetches products from a Shopify store via the Storefront GraphQL API, defining related TypeScript interfaces and a fetchShopifyProducts function.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL query parameters (including from hash-based routes), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Jost), oklch-based color tokens (blush, gold, ivory, etc.), box shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations, with plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the cosmetics e-commerce project at version 23, listing existing features (homepage, catalog, cart, checkout, admin panel, etc.), known issues (site settings color scheme save failing with an authorization error), and flags the project as a fix request.
